The Warrior Set comes with the Tomahawk essentials, as well as a convenient case to protect your investment. The case also makes it easy to get your set onto the job site. Columbia Tomahawk Smoothing Blades make easy work out of sanding and finishing.

With no plastic pieces, the Tomalock doesn't snap under pressure or the weight of the larger blades. This also increases stability. The quick-release allows you to easily and steadily adjust the angle of attack. Name: Graco Ultra QuickShot
Short description: The Ultra QuickShot is a breakthrough technology, designed to deliver higher quality and provide results faster, created for the perfect airless finish, while virtually eliminating spits.
Description:
The Ultra QuickShot is a breakthrough technology, designed to deliver higher quality and provide results faster, created for the perfect airless finish, while virtually eliminating spits. Built with extreme spray control to quickly adjust pressure for every application.

The industry's most portable sprayer allows you to spray in the tightest of areas with precision and the highest control. Spray the broadest range of architectural coatings, from water-based paints, to solvents, and flammable-based materials. Perfect for small jobs such as cabinets, doors, trim, soffits, gutters, and more.

Instant Response Electric Powered Gun Virtually Eliminates Spits

Reduce fatigue with the industry's lightest trigger pull

Smallest, lightest airless gun ever built

Responds instantly to produce the best finish

On-Demand Precision Flow-Control System

Quickly adjust the material flow for extreme airless spray control

Easily dial-in to your desired pressure from 100-2,000 psi

6 ft Flexible Hose For Full Reach & Easy Hose Management

Easily prime, change colors, and clean in seconds

The gun and hose hold only 1 oz of coating

QuickShot ProConnect Airless Piston Pump

Durable long-life triple piston pump

32 oz Pour-N-Go Cup

Easy fill design - refill on your hip

Spray small amounts FAST

Power to Take on Every Small Job

It comes with two DEWALT 20V Lithium-ion batteries

Spray up to one gallon on each battery

Ultimate Hands-Free Portability With Belt and Holster Attachment

Description:

Engineered for modern drywall finishing, this tool delivers the reliability you need to maintain consistent output and quality on every project.

Why Level5 Professionals Choose This Tool

  • Durable Materials: Constructed from corrosion-resistant stainless steel for long-term reliability
  • Ergonomic Design: Reduces hand fatigue during extended use with comfortable grip design

Product Specifications

Name: SurPro 20-30" Magnesium Double Sided Stilt
Short description: SurPro set the bar and then broke it with the invention of double-sided drywall stilts. The newly updated SurPro S2 maximizes everyday performance by further elevating your comfort and stability.
Description:
Elevate Your Workflow with SurPro S2 Precision Stilts

Experience the pinnacle of professional-grade stability with the SurPro S2 Magnesium Double-Sided Stilts. Engineered for the demanding drywall contractor, these stilts redefine job-site efficiency by minimizing fatigue and maximizing balance. By utilizing a sophisticated double-sided pole architecture, the S2 series provides a rock-solid foundation that allows you to maneuver with confidence, whether you are hanging board, taping, or finishing ceilings.

Unmatched Comfort and Structural Integrity

Designed to withstand the rigors of daily heavy-duty use, the S2 features a lightweight yet incredibly durable magnesium-alloy frame. The innovative 360-degree wraparound leg bands move in harmony with your natural gait, eliminating the pressure points common in traditional single-pole designs. With a fully customizable fit—including adjustable calf height, footbed length, and lean tension—these stilts adapt to your specific biomechanics, ensuring you remain productive from the first hour to the last.

Key Features

  • Interlock Safety System: Patented redundancy technology provides peace of mind by securing all critical stress points during operation.
  • Hex-Extruded Frame: The unique hexagonal geometry offers superior structural rigidity while maintaining a lightweight profile for all-day wear.
  • Double-Clamshell Design: Enhances lateral stability and prevents the twisting motion often found in standard stilts, ensuring a consistent, balanced stance.
  • Precision Adjustability: Features comprehensive customization for leg band positioning, footplate length, and forward/backward lean tension.
  • High-Traction Soles: Industrial-grade, non-marking rubber soles deliver exceptional grip on both residential and commercial flooring surfaces.

Name: TapeTech 10" EasyClean Finishing Box
Short description: The TapeTech EasyClean Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass.
Description:
Achieve Flawless Drywall Finishes with Precision Engineering

Elevate your drywall finishing workflow with the TapeTech 10" EasyClean Finishing Box. Designed for professionals who demand speed without sacrificing quality, this tool streamlines the application of joint compound, ensuring perfectly feathered edges on both butt and flat joints in a single, efficient pass. Whether you are tackling ceilings or walls, this finishing box delivers consistent, high-quality results that minimize sanding and maximize productivity.

Advanced Control and Versatility

Engineered for adaptability, the EasyClean Finishing Box features an intuitive crown adjustment dial, allowing you to precisely calibrate the compound thickness for each stage of the finishing process. The integrated pivoting axle is a game-changer for uneven surfaces, automatically compensating for height discrepancies between drywall sheets to maintain a smooth, professional finish every time.

Key Features

  • EasyRoll Wheel System: Integrated wheels allow for rapid finishing of outside corner beads, working seamlessly with metal, paper-faced, vinyl, and bullnose materials up to twice as fast as manual methods.
  • Superior Alignment: The EasyRoll design ensures perfect alignment with the finishing blade, eliminating the need for awkward tilting and providing a stable, guided path along corner beads.
  • Optimized Compound Application: Automatically dispenses the ideal volume of joint compound to embed tape and feather edges, reducing material waste and labor time.
  • Enhanced Stability: The wide-shoulder wheel design provides exceptional tracking, keeping the box securely on the corner bead without the need for aftermarket attachments.
  • Versatile Application: Perfectly suited for both first-coat tape embedding and subsequent finishing coats on walls and ceilings.

Technical Specifications

Precision Engineering for Seamless Results

Name: TapeTech 12" EasyClean Finishing Box
Short description: The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass.
Description:
Master Professional Drywall Finishing

Achieve flawless, high-production results with the TapeTech 12" EasyClean Finishing Box. Engineered for efficiency, this tool streamlines the drywall finishing process by simultaneously dispensing the precise volume of joint compound and feathering edges on both flat and butt joints. Whether you are tackling walls or ceilings, this box ensures a consistent, professional-grade finish in a single pass, significantly reducing manual labor and rework.

Precision Control and Versatility

Designed for the demands of professional contractors, the EasyClean system features an intuitive crown adjustment dial. This allows for seamless transitions between the initial embedding coat and subsequent finishing layers, ensuring the perfect amount of compound is applied every time. Furthermore, the integrated pivoting axle automatically compensates for uneven drywall surfaces, maintaining optimal contact and a smooth, level finish even when one side of the joint sits higher than the other.

Key Features

  • EasyRoll™ Wheel System: Integrated wheels allow for rapid finishing of outside corner beads—up to twice as fast as manual methods—without requiring additional attachments.

Precision Engineering for Professionals

The 76TT model replaces traditional, cumbersome maintenance requirements with a streamlined, user-friendly interface. The standout innovation is the integrated O-Ring system, which eliminates the need for unreliable paper gaskets. This ensures a leak-proof connection for your filler adapters and goosenecks, preventing messy blowouts and reducing the frustration of replacing lost or degraded components. With its slim-profile tube and reinforced construction, this pump is built to withstand the daily wear and tear of professional drywall finishing.

Key Features

  • Integrated O-Ring Seal: Eliminates the need for paper gaskets, ensuring a secure, airtight connection that is easier to maintain and less prone to failure.
  • Twist-Lock Foot Valve: Allows for rapid attachment and detachment, simplifying the cleaning process and reducing time spent on tool maintenance.
  • Slim Tube Profile: Designed for optimal ergonomics and portability, making it the preferred choice for finishers who value efficiency and ease of handling.
  • Versatile Compatibility: Fully compatible with standard 85T goosenecks for automatic tapers and 90T filler adapters for finishing boxes, MudRunners, corner applicators, and nail spotters.
  • Robust Construction: Engineered for long-term durability, ensuring consistent performance even in high-volume, demanding environments.
